example.title: 浣跨敤绀轰緥
example.python_anthropic:
from anthropic import Anthropic

client = Anthropic(
    # 鎺ㄨ崘浣跨敤 127.0.0.1
    base_url="{{baseUrl}}",
    api_key="{{apiKey}}"
)

# 娉ㄦ剰: Antigravity 鏀寔浣跨敤 Anthropic SDK 璋冪敤浠绘剰妯″瀷
response = client.messages.create(
    model="{{modelId}}",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}]
)

print(response.content[0].text)
example.python_gemini:
# 闇€瑕佸畨瑁? pip install google-generativeai
import google.generativeai as genai

# 浣跨敤 Antigravity 浠ｇ悊鍦板潃 (鎺ㄨ崘 127.0.0.1)
genai.configure(
    api_key="{{apiKey}}",
    transport='rest',
    client_options={'api_endpoint': '{{rawBaseUrl}}'}
)

model = genai.GenerativeModel('{{modelId}}')
response = model.generate_content("Hello")
print(response.text)
example.python_openai_image:
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="{{baseUrl}}",
    api_key="{{apiKey}}"
)

response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="{{modelId}}",
    # 鏂瑰紡 1: 浣跨敤 size 鍙傛暟 (鎺ㄨ崘)
    # 鏀寔: "1024x1024" (1:1), "1280x720" (16:9), "720x1280" (9:16), "1216x896" (4:3)
    extra_body={ "size": "1024x1024" },

    # 鏂瑰紡 2: 浣跨敤妯″瀷鍚庣紑
    # 渚嬪: gemini-3-pro-image-16-9, gemini-3-pro-image-4-3
    # model="gemini-3-pro-image-16-9",
    messages=[{
        "role": "user",
        "content": "鐢讳竴涓湭鏉ュ煄甯俓

python_openai:
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="{{baseUrl}}",
    api_key="{{apiKey}}"
)

response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="{{modelId}}",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}]
)

print(response.choices[0].message.content)
